name: toolchain alternatives: iac alternatives include Terraform, a cloud-native option, and Pulumi
command:
cat > h.json <<'JEOF'
{"platform":"aws","iac_targets":["terraform"]}
JEOF
cat > req.json <<'JEOF'
{"pillars":{"integration":[{"concern":"message_queue"}]}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/toolchain-advisor.sh" --handoff h.json --requirements req.json --out tc.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("tc.json","utf8"));const R=j.recommendations;const cat=c=>R.find(r=>r.category===c);const has=(c,t)=>cat(c).alternatives.some(a=>a.tool===t);process.exit(has("iac","terraform")&&has("iac","aws-cloudformation")&&has("iac","pulumi")?0:1)' && echo iac-alts 1>&2
